title: Career Opportunity Medical Officer at Fortis Healthcare Global Group

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Medical Officer at Fortis Healthcare Global Group
jsonLd.description:
Fortis Healthcare Global Group is actively seeking a talented and motivated Medical Officer to join our dynamic team in Tiruchirappalli. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Fortis Healthcare Global Group:
Fortis Healthcare Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Infection Control

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Fortis Healthcare Global Group!
